Silver opal ring
(Eternal)
Quality:
Type: Crafted
Slot: Ring
Value: 287
Keyword: Ring
Search
Keywords: 		Global
Woodcutting
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

This unassuming silver band sparkles in the right light with flashes of iridescence.

The Silver opal ring item is a crafted item.

Requirements

This item has no requirements to use it.

Attributes

Quality Attributes

Global +1% Fine material finding
+4% Find bird nests While doing Woodcutting.

Global +2% Fine material finding
+5% Find bird nests While doing Woodcutting.

Global +3% Fine material finding
+6% Find bird nests While doing Woodcutting.

Global +4% Fine material finding
+7% Find bird nests While doing Woodcutting.

Global +5% Fine material finding
+8% Find bird nests While doing Woodcutting.

Global +6% Fine material finding
+10% Find bird nests While doing Woodcutting.

Uses

Job Boards

Silver opal ring can be requested from the following job:

Job Board Name Location Quantity Item Type Rewards
Everhaven combined job board Everhaven 2 +2  Erdwise Faction Reputation
1x   Trinketry chest
Everhaven combined job board Everhaven 1 +2  Erdwise Faction Reputation
1x   Chest of Erdwise

Sources

Primary Recipe Output

Create a silver opal ring

You carefully prepare the silver before securing the opal into the finished silver band, its shifting colours catching the light as you adjust the final setting.

Set a fiery opal into a silver ring.

Recipe Outputs
Recipe Name Level Service
Requirement 		Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Create a silver opal ring Trinketry lvl. 10 Needs Basic Trinketry Bench service or better. 1x Opal
1x Silver bar		 1x Silver opal ring

XP 		Base
Steps 		Base

Steps 		Max

XP/Step 		Full Recipe
W.E.A.R.

Rate 		W.E.A.R.
